zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield於1258年之前出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親John de La Warre32歲，母親Olympia de Folkington22歲。他於1276年9月12日與Clarice de Tregoz在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1298年被列為governor of burgh castle 。他去世於1320年6月20日在英國英格蘭素可武費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield于1258年之前出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲John de La Warre32岁，母亲Olympia de Folkington22岁。他于1276年9月12日与Clarice de Tregoz在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1298年被列为governor of burgh castle 。他去世于1320年6月20日在英国英格兰素可武費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Warre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Warr
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a warrior, usually from Norman French were, werre, waire, warre (central French guerre) ‘war, battle’, and short for de la werre (de la guerre, see Delaware ), literally ‘(man) of the war’, a construction paralleled in de la Bataille (see Battle ). Occasionally it is a shortened form of Old French werreur ‘warrior’.

variants.name: Ware
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by or looked after a dam or weir on a river (from Old English wær, wer, Middle English war(e), warre, wer(e), werre ‘weir’), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Weare (Somerset), Weare Giffard (Devon), or Ware (Hertfordshire).
topographic name for someone who lived by a horse pond or fish pond, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English wayour, which became early modern English ware, wear.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield was born before 1258, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de La Warre, was 32 and his mother, Olympia de Folkington, was 22. He married Clarice de Tregoz on 12 September 1276, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1298, his occupation is listed as governor of burgh castle . He died on 20 June 1320, in Uckfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield est né avant 1258, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de La Warre, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Olympia de Folkington, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Clarice de Tregoz le 12 septembre 1276, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1298, sa profession de son indiquée est governor of burgh castle . Il est décédé le 20 juin 1320, à Uckfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield vor 1258 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de La Warre 32 und seine Mutter Olympia de Folkington 22. Er hat am 12. September 1276 in England Clarice de Tregoz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1298 ist sein Beruf als governor of burgh castle  aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Juni 1320 in Uckfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield è nato il prima del 1258 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de La Warre, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Olympia de Folkington, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Clarice de Tregoz il 12 settembre 1276, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1298, la sua occupazione è indicata come governor of burgh castle . Morì il 20 giugno 1320, nel Uckfield, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger la Warre Lord of Isefieldが1258年以前にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de La Warreは32歳，母Olympia de Folkingtonは22歳であった。1276年9月12日にイギリスでClarice de Tregozと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1298年，職業はgovernor of burgh castle と記録されている。彼は1320年6月20日にイギリスイギリススセックスウクフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield(이)가 1258년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de La Warre(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Olympia de Folkington(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1276년 9월 12일 영국에서 Clarice de Tregoz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1298년, 그의 직업은 governor of burgh castle 이었다. 그는 1320년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 ck필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield nasceu antes 1258, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de La Warre, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Olympia de Folkington, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Clarice de Tregoz em 12 de setembro de 1276, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1298, sua profissão aparece como governor of burgh castle . Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1320, em Uckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield родился перед 1258 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de La Warre было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Olympia de Folkington, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Clarice de Tregoz 12 сентября 1276 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1298 году он работал по профессии governor of burgh castle . Он умер 20 июня 1320 г. в местности уккфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield nació antes de 1258, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de La Warre, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Olympia de Folkington, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Clarice de Tregoz el 12 de septiembre de 1276, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1298, su ocupación registrada era governor of burgh castle . Murió el 20 de junio de 1320, en Uckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
